title: The Golden Forest
description: a mod that adds a bright yellow forest biome with new plants, flowers, petals, trees, a mob, and a new shiny wood set.
body:
![Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78bd4c599c9ee685148541cd1e78d310bb618f1c_0.webp)!

The Golden Forest is a mod that adds a new yellow-coded biome with striking visuals called the Golden Forest. This is a biome in real life and can be found in many places in Autumn, but this specific mod is inspired by the Japanese Golden Forests.

![the Golden Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c1d3ad9e09b82cacef3f6c52da712d46a8b0892.png)

The biome in this mod has many features aside from its striking gold pallette. It has new petals called the Golden Petals, that work just like the Pink Petals, except more common in the biome and, you know, they're yellow. This biome also has a new Golden Plant, leaf particles, and a brand new mob, the Deer!

![the Deer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcd29d84d82bf2f54178144523cbb3ea5b4a469e.png)

The deer is an animal creature exclusive to the Golden Forest. Its main features are its drops. The Deer has a chance to drop Venison, a meat that can be eaten raw or cooked into a better version of itself, and the Antler, an item that can be used to craft an Attack Speed potion, that increases your jump boost, and the Antlered Netherite Helmet.

![Antlered Netherite Helmet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f22cc6bd03ac00f91860cf4b13ef1333698431f5.png)

This helmet comes with a special ability of a charge attack. Not a charged attack, a charge attack. If you run forward while looking down, you will impale the mobs infront of you with the antler, damaging them and sending them flying.

![Antlered Netherite Helmet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45162d3073406bee741947d89617a2c603094d9b.png)
